words.definitionEn: A document listing goods or services provided and the amount due.
words.exampleEn: Please send the invoice to our accounting department by Friday.
words.exampleZh: 请在周五前把发票发给我们的财务部门。

words.definitionEn: A short official note or report circulated within an organization.
words.exampleEn: All staff received a memorandum about the new security procedures yesterday.
words.exampleZh: 全体员工昨天收到了一份关于新安全规程的备忘录。

words.definitionEn: Paper, pens, and other materials used for writing in an office.
words.exampleEn: Please order extra stationery for the new employees starting next Monday.
words.exampleZh: 请为下周一入职的新员工订购额外的文具。

words.definitionEn: A list of items to be discussed at a meeting.
words.exampleEn: The budget review is the first item on today's agenda.
words.exampleZh: 预算审查是今天议程上的第一项。

words.definitionEn: A person or company that delivers documents or packages quickly.
words.exampleEn: The signed documents were sent by courier to the head office this morning.
words.exampleZh: 签署好的文件今天上午已由快递送往总部。

words.definitionEn: A complete list or stock of goods held by a business.
words.exampleEn: Staff will conduct a full inventory of office equipment at the end of the month.
words.exampleZh: 员工将在月底对办公设备进行全面盘点。
